name: closed-loop test cleans up the synthetic test rule and pattern artifacts after a successful run
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules --cleanup 2>out.txt && [ ! -f active-rules/test-pattern.yaml ] && grep -q 'cleanup=done' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
